title: API Gateway Management
description: Enterprise API gateway: rate limiting, API key management, OAuth2 + mTLS, usage analytics, developer portal, request/response transforms, and dead-letter queue handling across cloud and on-prem APIs.
features: Centralised rate limiting, throttling, protocol transforms
OAuth2, mTLS, API-key auth with role-based scopes
Developer self-service portal + SDK generation
Built-in developer portal: docs, try-it console, usage analytics
Dead-letter queue + retry logic with configurable backoff
benefits: Protect backends from traffic spikes without cloud-proxy lock-in
API onboarding time for partners drops from weeks to hours
Usage insights + quota controls save 20-35% on API gateway spend

title: Backup & Disaster Recovery Solution
description: Immutable, air-gap backup and automated disaster recovery orchestration: continuous block-level snapshots, point-in-time restore (RPO<RTO<1h), cross-region failover testing, and compliance-ready chain-of-custody logs.
features: Continuous block-level snapshots every 60 seconds
Automated orchestrated failover across regions or on-prem
Point-in-time restore RPO < 1 h, RTO < 1 h guaranteed
Immutable WORM storage 30+ year retention, air-gapped
SOC 2 / ISO 27001 chain-of-custody audit logs
benefits: Cut DR drill time from 4+ hours to 15 min with automated test scripts
Pass SOC 2 / HIPAA audits effortlessly: chain-of-custody logs provisioned automatically

title: Code Quality & Governance Platform
description: Automated code-quality scanning: static analysis, lint coverage gates, dependency vulnerability CVE detection, code smell auditor, branch-protection + quality-gate CI/CD enforcement, and actionable fix suggestions.
features: Multi-lang static analysis 20+ languages, custom rulesets
CVE/GHSA dependency scanning with severity-graded alerts
Code-smell auditor + complexity hot-spot mapper
Quality-gate CI/CD blocks merge on quality score threshold
IDE plugin: VS Code + JetBrains — inline issue highlight + auto-fix
benefits: Cut production bugs by 40-70% via automated pre-merge quality gates
Save 8-12 engineering hours per sprint on manual peer review of style issues
Automatically stay CVE-clean with zero-day patch alerts CISA KEV + Exploit-DB matched

title: Endpoint Security & Compliance Monitor
description: Endpoint protection with continuous compliance scoring: EDR/XDR behavioural analytics, NIST/HIPAA/PCI-DSS attestation, posture-drift alerts, zero-trust device posture attestation, and hardware inventory + lifecycle tracking.
features: Behavioural EDR/XDR with ML anomaly detection across 50+ attack vectors
Continuous compliance scoring vs. NIST CSF, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CIS Controls
Zero-trust posture checks: device health, patch level, AV status before every auth
Inventory: asset tag, location, owner, patch level, remaining hardware support
Alert / ticket routing to IT, Security, or Compliance by severity and domain
benefits: Proactive endpoint threat detection with 4× faster MTTR than endpoint scanning alone
Stay audit-ready 24/7 — compliance reports generated on demand in one click
Reduce rogue devices on the corporate network by 80% via mandatory posture checks
